raw.subject: Your Oshkosh page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love seeing the enthusiasm around your Butter Chicken Burrito! It's clear you're bringing a taste of India to the heart of Wisconsin.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on bookings and calls from potential customers looking for authentic Indian food in Oshkosh.

I sketched a simple page idea from your Facebook posts, featuring a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions. Take a look:

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/namastewisconsin-oshkosh/

This is just a starting point, and I'd love to discuss how to bring it to life with a flat fee for local businesses. If you're interested in learning more, please reply or let's schedule a quick call to explore further.
